reviews.review_description: nice story. using vr watch the comic made me a bit headache and not very convincing. But the nice story in an imerssive way make me give this possitive rating.

reviews.review_title: Very Enjoyable way to experience Manga
reviews.review_description: I really appreciate the effort made to make this an immersive experience. The 2 different modes to tell the story are very well done. The voice acting and sound effects are a great way hear what is going on as you read the story. I also like the animated scenes that allow the reader to experience the events as if they are the main character. I hope we continue to get great content from this developer.

I bought this on sale for $4, and even then, I don’t think I got my money’s worth. The entire experience was about 30 minutes, and the description of the story in the App Store is about 75% of the actual story... It’s well done and overall enjoyable, but felt more like a demo to me than anything. Overall, an average experience. Would definitely not recommend at original price point.
